item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.
item.description: First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.

item.title: 👍💵Joel Anderson - Washington Student Achievement Council
item.description: Joel Anderson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Student Achievement Council. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Bill Lyne - United Faculty of Washington State
item.description: Bill Lyne signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent United Faculty of Washington State.

item.title: 👍Lauren McDonald - Microsoft
item.description: Lauren McDonald signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Microsoft.

item.title: 👍💵Neil Strege - Washington Roundtable
item.description: Neil Strege signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Roundtable. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: And refer to Ways & Means.
item.description: And refer to Ways & Means.

item.title: HEWD - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: HEWD - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.guid: 2026-01-22/HEWD - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: On motion, referred to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: On motion, referred to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-01-23/On motion, referred to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-04/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.guid: 2026-02-10/Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.
item.guid: 2026-02-12/First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.

item.title: 👍💵Joel Anderson - Washington Student Achievement Council
item.description: Joel Anderson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Student Achievement Council. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: PEW - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: PEW - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: PEW - Majority; do pass.
item.description: PEW - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-03-04/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: By resolution, returned to Senate Rules Committee for third reading.
item.description: By resolution, returned to Senate Rules Committee for third reading.
item.guid: 2026-03-12/By resolution, returned to Senate Rules Committee for third reading.
